title: Bray's Better Enchantment Outlines
description: A pack that gives enchanted tools and weapons a glowing outline, inspired by Actions & Stuff on Bedrock. Enchanting!
body:
<center>

# Bray's Better Enchantment Outlines

</center>
  
Inspired by Bedrock's Actions & Stuff, welcome to Bray's Better Enchantment Outlines! This pack gives supported items a glowing outline when enchanted. This pack is made much better by the use of [Respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts) to make many changes to the pack on the fly!

While there are currently a lot of enchantment outline pack options, I'm hoping to earn your vote for the best made one of them all :)

---------------------------------

This pack is still a WORK IN PROGRESS! Please feel free to follow development of my packs on [DISCORD](https://discord.gg/H7JPX6hPQB) :) -Bray

<center>

--------------------------------

<center>
  
[![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b716f9bf1f25106aea330ff2308302ce911dea3a.png)](https://discord.gg/H7JPX6hPQB)
[![Youtube](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e66483ab22160e1621066e9df3c259615edd2ba9.png)](https://www.youtube.com/@BraysWorld_MC)

</center>

## !!! **NOTICE** !!!

### Optifine, CIT Resewn or another CIT mod are required for versions of Minecraft before 1.21.4, items affected by the outline effect will be limited in older versions of Minecraft
  </center>
  
--------------------------------------------------

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/aHaCmjUwLWU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Respackopts
It is highly recommended to use this pack with [Respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts) as there are configurable settings already in place with even more customization to come!
### Outlined Items
- Swords
- Pickaxes
- Axes
- Shovels
- Hoes
- Tridents
- Maces
- Shields
- Shears
- More Item Support coming!
  - Bows
  - Crossbows
  - Fishing Rods
  - Enchanted Golden Apples
  - Nether Stars
  - XP Bottles
  - Flint and Steel
  - Brushes
  - Armor Items
  - Elytra
  - Enchanted Books
  - Potions
  - Beacon

### Respackopts Settings
- Change outline style
  - Static Color: Applies a static color to all items with the outline effect
    - Purple
    - Blue
    - Yellow
    - Green
    - Red
    - White
    - Void (Black)
    - Rainbow!
  
  - Material Type: Applies outline color depending on item's color scheme / materials
    - Netherite
    - Diamond
    - Gold
    - Iron
    - Stone
    - Wood
    - Mace [Purple]
    - Trident [Green]
    - Shears [Red/brown]

- Toggle compatible items to support other resource packs
    - Vanilla
    - Bray's World - Maces and Shields
    - (PLANNED) Vanilla Tweaks - Shields, Maces and XP Bottles
    - (PLANNED) Fresh Foods - Enchanted Golden Apple
    - (OPEN TO POPULAR SUGGESTIONS)
  
- Toggle individual item's if you don't want them to receive the outline effect
  


![Bray with Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f260802d796eec295a6ac29e38ff334c2c9fee0.png)
